_meta: Canonical SEO + JSON-LD sync for ToolBite HTML. Run: python3 scripts/seo_metadata.py --apply && python3 scripts/seo_metadata.py --check. page_type: homepage | category | tool | guide_hub | guide_article | trust | utility. Optional: og_title, og_description; schema_date_modified (YYYY-MM-DD or ISO); schema_breadcrumb_leaf (tool/guide last crumb); schema_article_headline (Article); icon (for search); tags (for search). FAQPage & ItemList blocks are not auto-edited.

index.html.title: ToolBite — Private, browser-based tools for text, developers & SEO
index.html.description: Free utilities that run in your browser: text cleanup, JSON and JWT helpers, image compression, and SEO helpers. Routine processing stays on your device—no account required.

about.html.title: About ToolBite — Local-first browser utilities
about.html.description: Who builds ToolBite, why we ship static client-side tools, and how we keep everyday workflows out of our servers when the tool allows it.

privacy.html.title: Privacy policy — ToolBite
privacy.html.description: How ToolBite handles browser-local processing, hosting logs, cookies, Google AdSense, and third parties. Plain language, no hidden data collection pitch.

terms.html.title: Terms of service — ToolBite
terms.html.description: Rules for using ToolBite’s free browser tools: acceptable use, no-warranty stance, ads, and limitations—short and practical.

contact.html.title: Contact ToolBite — Bugs, ideas & partnerships
contact.html.description: Reach the ToolBite team for bug reports, tool requests, or partnerships. We read everything; response time varies.

search.html.title: Search tools — ToolBite
search.html.description: Find a ToolBite utility by name or keyword. Results load in your browser; this page is not indexed.

categories/text-tools.html.title: Text tools — edit & clean copy in your browser | ToolBite
categories/text-tools.html.description: Case changes, spacing cleanup, counters, slugs, and line tools—all run locally in the browser so drafts stay on your device.

categories/developer-tools.html.title: Developer tools — JSON, JWT, encoding & hashes | ToolBite
categories/developer-tools.html.description: Format JSON, decode JWT headers and payloads for inspection, Base64, URL encoding, UUIDs, and SHA helpers—client-side where the tool allows it.

categories/image-tools.html.title: Image tools — compress & convert in the browser | ToolBite
categories/image-tools.html.description: Resize-ready compression and lightweight image workflows using browser APIs—files are not uploaded to ToolBite for processing.

categories/seo-tools.html.title: SEO tools — slugs, read time & publishing helpers | ToolBite
categories/seo-tools.html.description: Slug builders, read-time estimates, and small utilities that support SEO and publishing workflows without sending your copy to our servers.

guides/index.html.title: Guides — JSON, JWT & SEO workflows | ToolBite
guides/index.html.description: Short, practical write-ups tied to ToolBite utilities: fix broken JSON, decode JWTs safely, and tighten URL slugs—all with a browser-first mindset.

guides/json-formatter-guide.html.title: Guide: fix invalid JSON in the browser | ToolBite
guides/json-formatter-guide.html.description: A straight checklist for trailing commas, quotes, and common parse errors—meant for API payloads and config you paste into ToolBite’s formatter.
guides/json-formatter-guide.html.h1_inner: JSON formatter guide: fix invalid JSON fast
guides/json-formatter-guide.html.tags: json guide tutorial fix invalid json trailing comma quotes

guides/jwt-decoder-guide.html.title: Guide: decode JWTs safely (decode ≠ verify) | ToolBite
guides/jwt-decoder-guide.html.description: What a browser decoder can and cannot do, which claims to eyeball first, and why signature checks still belong on your server.
guides/jwt-decoder-guide.html.h1_inner: How to decode JWT safely (without trusting payload)
guides/jwt-decoder-guide.html.tags: jwt guide tutorial token verify claims security auth

guides/seo-slug-best-practices.html.title: Guide: SEO-friendly URL slugs | ToolBite
guides/seo-slug-best-practices.html.description: Length, separators, keywords, and mistakes that waste crawl budget—paired with ToolBite’s text-to-slug helper for quick clean URLs.
guides/seo-slug-best-practices.html.tags: seo slug guide url best practices permalink keywords hyphens

tools/word-counter.html.title: Word counter — counts in your browser | ToolBite
tools/word-counter.html.description: Words, characters, sentences, and paragraphs for drafts and specs. Everything runs locally after the page loads—paste long documents freely.

tools/password-generator.html.title: Password generator — cryptographically strong, local | ToolBite
tools/password-generator.html.description: Generate long random passwords with the Web Crypto API where available. Nothing is sent to ToolBite; copy and store secrets in your own vault.

tools/json-formatter.html.title: JSON formatter & validator — beautify in the browser | ToolBite
tools/json-formatter.html.description: Beautify, minify, and spot syntax errors before you ship payloads or JSON-LD. Parsing and formatting stay in your tab—not on our servers.

tools/find-replace.html.title: Find & replace text — bulk edits locally | ToolBite
tools/find-replace.html.description: Replace phrases across long pasted text with optional case sensitivity. Runs entirely in JavaScript—good for logs, lists, and CMS exports.

tools/lorem-ipsum.html.title: Lorem ipsum generator — placeholder copy in-browser | ToolBite
tools/lorem-ipsum.html.description: Classic filler paragraphs for layouts and CMS previews. Generated text never leaves your browser session.

tools/remove-extra-spaces.html.title: Remove extra spaces — clean pasted text locally | ToolBite
tools/remove-extra-spaces.html.description: Collapse runs of spaces, trim lines, or strip blank lines from messy copy. All transformations happen client-side for privacy.

tools/image-compressor.html.title: Image compressor — shrink files in your browser | ToolBite
tools/image-compressor.html.description: JPEG and WebP output with a quality slider using canvas APIs. Your images are not uploaded to ToolBite for processing.
tools/image-compressor.html.tags: image compress jpg png webp photo

tools/color-palette-generator.html.title: Color palette generator — random HEX sets | ToolBite
tools/color-palette-generator.html.description: Spin up five-color palettes and copy HEX codes with one click. Useful for UI spikes; all randomness runs in the browser.

tools/case-converter.html.title: Case converter — UPPER, lower, Title, camelCase | ToolBite
tools/case-converter.html.description: Switch naming styles for code, headings, or data cleanup without sending strings to a backend—paste, convert, copy.
tools/case-converter.html.tags: case uppercase lowercase title camelCase text

tools/text-to-slug.html.title: Text to slug — URL-safe strings in-browser | ToolBite
tools/text-to-slug.html.description: Turn headlines into lowercase, hyphenated slugs for blogs and product URLs. Processing stays on your device.

tools/read-time-calculator.html.title: Read time calculator — estimate minutes to read | ToolBite
tools/read-time-calculator.html.description: Paste an article or doc to approximate reading time from word count. Handy before publishing; runs fully client-side.
tools/read-time-calculator.html.tags: read time wpm minutes blog seo

tools/base64-encoder.html.title: Base64 encoder & decoder — UTF-8 aware | ToolBite
tools/base64-encoder.html.description: Encode or decode Base64 for tokens, snippets, and small payloads. Strings stay in your browser tab unless you copy them elsewhere.

tools/uuid-generator.html.title: UUID generator — version 4 IDs locally | ToolBite
tools/uuid-generator.html.description: Generate random v4 UUIDs for databases, fixtures, and API tests. IDs are created in-browser; nothing is logged by ToolBite.

tools/url-encoder.html.title: URL encoder & decoder — query-safe strings | ToolBite
tools/url-encoder.html.description: Encode or decode URI components and full URLs for debugging and hand-built links. All work happens locally after load.

tools/hash-generator.html.title: Hash generator — SHA-256 & SHA-1 in-browser | ToolBite
tools/hash-generator.html.description: Compute digests for strings using Web Crypto where available. Inputs are not uploaded; hashes are for local verification workflows.

tools/jwt-decoder.html.title: JWT decoder — inspect header & payload locally | ToolBite
tools/jwt-decoder.html.description: Decode JWT header and payload JSON for debugging. This is decode-only: signature verification still belongs in your trusted backend.

tools/remove-duplicate-lines.html.title: Remove duplicate lines — dedupe lists locally | ToolBite
tools/remove-duplicate-lines.html.description: Keep first occurrences of repeated lines in pasted logs, keywords, or inventories. No server round-trip for the dedupe logic.

tools/sort-text-lines.html.description: Alphabetize or reverse lines for quick cleanup of exports and checklists. Sorting runs entirely in your browser.

tools/qr-generator.html.description: Generate QR codes instantly for any URL, text, email or phone number. Download as PNG. No uploads, no account required — everything runs in your browser.

tools/csv-to-json.html.title: CSV to JSON Converter — Free, instant, browser-based | ToolBite
tools/csv-to-json.html.description: Instantly convert CSV data to a valid JSON array in your browser. Paste your spreadsheet, configure options, copy the result. No uploads, no account required.
